sources.title: Professor Layton and the Miracle Mask US Any% Guide — route by tutelarfiber7, formatting by StarrlightSims (70-page PDF with action-by-action route, puzzle numbers and solution screenshots; local PDF: layton-mm/sources/Professor Layton and the Miracle Mask US Any% Guide.pdf)

Professor Layton 5 Walkthrough (blogspot) — spoiler-free illustrated walkthrough: all 150 puzzles with solutions and staged hints, hint coin locations with screenshots, minigames, organized by chapter and puzzle number
Nintendo 3DS electronic manual — Professor Layton and the Miracle Mask (EN): controls, movement mode, Professor's Trunk, hint coin mechanics (local PDF: layton-mm/sources/nintendo-e-manual-en.pdf)

Professor Layton 5 Walkthrough (blogspot) — Hint Coin Locations index: the per-chapter list of every visitable location (US and UK names), linking to per-location hint-coin picture pages (local capture: layton-mm/sources/pl5-walkthrough/pl5-hintcoins.html)
